{"rule":"LOG_IN","sentence":"^\\QA) No — the app IS the landing page; redirect to login/dashboard directly\nB) Yes — a simple landing page explaining the app, then enter\nC) Yes — a beautiful marketing page, with the app at /app or /dashboard\nD) Later — V1 just needs the app running\\E$"}
{"rule":"WHITESPACE_RULE","sentence":"^\\Qcircalog.app          → Landing/coming soon page (V1), evolves into full marketing page (V2+)\ncircalog.app/log      → The PWA app itself (always)\nRoot domain is the public face of CircaLog\nApp lives permanently at /log — clean, descriptive, never changes\\E$"}

{"rule":"A_INFINITIVE","sentence":"^\\QAlways use \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q for moving tracked files — otherwise Git sees a delete + a new untracked file instead of a rename, and the file history is lost.\\E$"}
{"rule":"OF_ANY_OF","sentence":"^\\QDo not edit the contents of any of these files.\\E$"}

{"rule":"ALL_OF_THE","sentence":"^\\QConfirm all of the following:\\E$"}
{"rule":"THE_SUPERLATIVE","sentence":"^\\QList view of all past sleep entries 🟡\nShow: cycle number, date, start time, wake time, duration, quality, session type 🟡\nFilter by: date range, session type, quality rating 🟡\nSort: most recent first (default) / oldest first 🟢\\E$"}
{"rule":"MISSING_TO_BETWEEN_BE_AND_VB","sentence":"^\\Q✅ The coming soon page renders in dark mode by default — deep charcoal background (\\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q), violet accents, light text\n✅ No white flash visible on load or reload\n✅ Open DevTools → Application → Local Storage → \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q\nIf \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q is absent: confirm dark mode is active\nAdd key \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q with value \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q, reload — page must render in light mode (near-white background \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q, dark text, violet accents unchanged)\nDelete the key, reload — dark mode must return\n✅ Open DevTools → Elements — confirm \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q has \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q in dark mode and no \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q class in light mode\\E$"}
